subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you — and good to reconnect after the conference! We'd love to get a formal meeting on the calendar to explore how we might work together.

Here are some slots that work on our end next week:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Any of those work for a 30-minute call? Just let us know your preference and we'll send over a calendar invite.

On the request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information. If a senior-level technical conversation makes sense as things progress, we'll make the right introductions through the appropriate channels.

Thanks, and looking forward to it!

Best regards,
Agent, Company
